# Let's open the provided file and read its raw text
path = "/mnt/data/file-76YTjx5x2ti1uUpAtsAXAa-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw_text = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
raw_text

text = raw_text
candidates = [
"فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ",
"فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ",
"إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ",
"فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ",
"فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين",
]
for c in candidates:
    idxs=[]
    start=0
    while True:
        i = text.find(c, start)
        if i==-1: break
        idxs.append(i)
        start=i+1
    print(c, idxs)

def context(pos, n=80):
    s = max(0, pos-n)
    e = min(len(text), pos+len("فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ") + n)
    return text[s:e]
for pos in [196,530,684,1056,1141,1091,124]:
    print("----", pos, "----")
    print(context(pos, 120))

spans = []
full = "فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ"
start_full = raw_text.find(full)
end_full = start_full + len(full)
start_full, end_full, raw_text[start_full:end_full] == full

extractions = []

def add_span(text, citation_type):
    start = raw_text.find(text)
    # For duplicates, need to iterate? We'll handle manually by positions we identified
    return

# Build spans with positions we identified:
spans_info = [
    (124, full, "Aya"),
    (530, "فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ", "Aya"),
    (684, "إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ", "Aya"),
    (1056, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ", "Aya"),
    (1091, "فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين", "Aya"),
    (1141, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ", "Aya"),
]
# Verify each slice matches and adjust for any stray quotes; per rule 2 we might need to slide up to 2 chars inward
validated = []
for start, span_text, ctype in spans_info:
    end = start + len(span_text)
    snippet = raw_text[start:end]
    if snippet != span_text:
        # try to find exact occurrence starting at or after start
        alt = raw_text.find(span_text, start-2, start+3)
        if alt != -1:
            start = alt
            end = start + len(span_text)
            snippet = raw_text[start:end]
    assert snippet == span_text, (start, span_text, snippet)
    validated.append((start, end, span_text, ctype))
validated
